name: Carla
materials: Swill basket making with Split oak. It becomes flexible strips, then a tough working basket—built for land-based life and long use.
brand_statement: A hand-woven oak swill basket built for daily life, blending timeless craft with rugged beauty.
target_audience: Thoughtful buyers who love natural home goods and want something durable, beautiful, and made to last.
price_positioning: £75–£95 — reflects the 10 hours of skilled craft and premium, long-lasting materials
key_message: Beautiful every day. Built to last a lifetime.
